personality_one_liner: A serious, command-center training tool with a premium OLED-friendly dark slate/green casino aesthetic, prioritizing glanceable metrics and high-contrast poker actions.

spacing.rule: Use tight vertical rhythm for data and large, thumb-friendly tap targets for actions. Maintain strict safe area clearances. Elements like 'Nova Análise' CTA should be pinned at the bottom above the tab bar.

do's: Use heavy tint + blur on the bottom tab bar
Use for the floating TTS indicator overlay
Use as a backdrop behind the prominent Recommendation card overlay
dont's: Avoid on dense tracker data grids or manual card selectors
Never blur body text or the primary input form

screens.name: Disclaimer
screens.purpose: Mandatory warning screen ensuring users know the app is exclusively for offline/simulator training, not real-money play.
screens.layout: Full-bleed dark image background with gradient top-to-bottom scrim. Large bold headline in Barlow Condensed, body text explaining terms in DM Sans, and a sticky sticky full-width primary CTA 'Aceitar e Continuar' at the bottom.

screens.name: Home (Analisar)
screens.purpose: Primary dashboard to trigger a new session, view quick stats, and launch image capture or upload.

states.empty: No recent sessions: display a high-contrast illustration of an empty poker table with 'Nenhuma análise recente' and a 'Nova Análise' button.
states.error: Error loading history, show retry button.

screens.layout: Prominent 'Nova Análise' sticky primary CTA at bottom. Above it, a visually dense but clean summary of equity, last analyzed hand, and tracking widgets. A floating TTS speaker indicator resides on the bottom right edge of the screen.

screens.name: Analysis & Recommendation
screens.purpose: The core visual output displaying the poker table state and immediate AI recommendation.

states.loading: Skeleton of the poker table and pulsating recommendation card.
states.error: Failed to analyze image/hand: show error toast and retry capture.

screens.layout: Top section: High-contrast 2D top-down view of a poker table (dark green/slate) showing Community Cards, Pot, and Stacks. Bottom section: Overlaid bottom-sheet/glass card with massive recommendation text (Desistir/Red, Pagar/Yellow, Aumentar/Green, Tudo/Amber). Contains confidence %, sizing, and Claude Sonnet reasoning text in DM Sans.

screens.name: Manual
screens.purpose: Manual input screen for private/community cards, stacks, and positions when camera is not used.
screens.layout: Dense utility grid. Card suit/rank pickers using grouped segmented controls, position selectors as pill grids. Submit button ('Analisar Mão') sticky at bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Histórico
screens.purpose: Session log of past hands and recommendations for review.

states.empty: Illustration of playing cards with 'Seu histórico está vazio'.

screens.layout: Vertical list view. Each row shows hand preview (AA, KQs, etc.), pot size, and the recommended action as a colored badge. Clean dividers.

screens.name: Ajustes
screens.purpose: Settings for language, TTS toggle, voice choice, and AI aggressiveness profile.
screens.layout: Simple list of rows with tinted icon containers (brandTertiary rounded square). Switches for TTS. Segemented control for style profile.

empty_history.alt: Abstract blue and white textile indicating empty dark cards

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility DARK guidelines. Do not use pure black; use the deep green/slate hex values provided to simulate an OLED-friendly poker felt.
Implement the Brazilian Portuguese translations exactly as required (Fold=Desistir, Call=Pagar, Raise=Aumentar, All-in=Tudo).

The primary recommendation card MUST color code actions: Desistir (Red / Error), Pagar (Yellow / Warning), Aumentar (Green / Success), Tudo (Amber / BrandPrimary). This overrides typical 'error' semantics because it's a poker action.
Place a sticky 'Nova Análise' button on the Home Dashboard.
Floating TTS Speaker indicator must use glassmorphism and be prominently displayed when TTS is active in the settings.
Utilize Barlow Condensed for large metrics, confidence percentages, and poker card ranks to give a professional, utility-first UI feel.
Ensure 'Disclaimer' screen requires mandatory acceptance and uses the provided gradient-to-dark scrim over the background image.
